title: Business Collocations Set 2 — Advanced Combinations
description: Master 30 high-impact business collocations used in investor presentations and board meetings. Learn to combine verbs and nouns like a native speaker — drive growth, secure funding, close a deal.
descriptionTr: Yatirimci sunumlari ve yonetim kurulu toplantilarinda kullanilan 30 yuksek etkili is kolokasyonunda ustala. Fiil ve isimleri anadili konusucu gibi birlestirmeyi ogren — buyume saglamak, fon saglamak, anlasma kapatmak.

vocabulary.example: Our new product line will drive growth in the Asian market.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yeni urun hattimiz Asya pazarinda buyume saglayacak.
vocabulary.extra: If we had invested earlier, we would have driven growth much faster.
vocabulary.extraTr: Daha erken yatirim yapsaydik, buyumeyi cok daha hizli saglardik.

vocabulary.example: The project has gained momentum since we hired the new team.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yeni ekibi ise aldigimizdan beri proje ivme kazandi.
vocabulary.extra: Once we launch the campaign, sales will gain momentum quickly.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kampanyayi baslattigimizda, satislar hizla ivme kazanacak.

vocabulary.example: Even as we scale, we must maintain quality across all products.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Olceklensek bile, tum urunlerde kaliteyi korumamiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: The factory that maintains quality consistently wins more contracts.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kaliteyi surekli koruyan fabrika daha fazla sozlesme kazaniyor.

vocabulary.example: By moving to a smaller office, we reduced overheads by 20%.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Daha kucuk bir ofise tasInarak genel giderleri %20 azalttik.
vocabulary.extra: If we reduced overheads further, profit margins would improve significantly.
vocabulary.extraTr: Genel giderleri daha da azaltsak, kar marjlari onemli olcude iyilesirdi.

vocabulary.example: We increased margins by renegotiating supplier contracts.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tedarikci sozlesmelerini yeniden muzakere ederek marjlari artirdik.
vocabulary.extra: The board expects us to increase margins by at least 5% this quarter.
vocabulary.extraTr: Yonetim kurulu bu ceyrekte marjlari en az %5 artirmamizi bekliyor.

vocabulary.example: To maximize profit, we need to optimize our supply chain.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kari maksimize etmek icin tedarik zincirimizi optimize etmemiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Had we maximized profit in Q2, we wouldn't be under pressure now.
vocabulary.extraTr: 2. ceyrekte kari maksimize etseydik, simdi baski altinda olmazdik.

vocabulary.example: Diversifying our portfolio helps minimize risk during market downturns.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Portfoyumuzu cesitlendirmek, piyasa dususlerinde riski en aza indirmeye yardimci olur.
vocabulary.extra: A thorough due diligence process is essential to minimize risk.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kapsamli bir durum tespiti sureci riski en aza indirmek icin gereklidir.

vocabulary.example: We need to allocate resources more efficiently across departments.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Departmanlar arasinda kaynaklari daha verimli tahsis etmemiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Resources were allocated based on the strategic priorities set by the board.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kaynaklar yonetim kurulunun belirledigi stratejik onceliklere gore tahsis edildi.

vocabulary.example: We secured funding from two venture capital firms for the expansion.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Genisleme icin iki girisim sermayesi firmasindan finansman sagladik.
vocabulary.extra: If we hadn't secured funding in time, the project would have been cancelled.
vocabulary.extraTr: Zamaninda finansman saglamasaydik, proje iptal edilirdi.

vocabulary.example: Our competitive salary packages help us attract top talent.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Rekabetci maas paketlerimiz en iyi yetenekleri cekmemize yardimci oluyor.
vocabulary.extra: Companies that embrace change tend to attract talent more easily.
vocabulary.extraTr: Degisimi benimseyen sirketler yetenekleri daha kolay cekme egilimindedir.

vocabulary.example: It costs five times more to acquire a new customer than to retain an existing one.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yeni bir musteri kazanmak, mevcut bir musteriyi elde tutmaktan bes kat daha pahaliya mal olur.
vocabulary.extra: By delivering excellent service, we retained 92% of our customers last year.
vocabulary.extraTr: Mukemmel hizmet sunarak gecen yil musterilerimizin %92'sini elde tuttuk.

vocabulary.example: We plan to expand operations into three new European markets.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Operasyonlari uc yeni Avrupa pazarina genisletmeyi planliyoruz.
vocabulary.extra: Had we expanded operations earlier, we would have captured more market share.
vocabulary.extraTr: Operasyonlari daha once genisletsaydik, daha fazla pazar payi elde ederdik.

vocabulary.example: Entering the South American market requires a strong local partner.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Guney Amerika pazarina girmek guclu bir yerel ortak gerektirir.
vocabulary.extra: We entered the market at the right time, which gave us a competitive advantage.
vocabulary.extraTr: Pazara dogru zamanda girdik, bu bize rekabet avantaji sagladi.

vocabulary.example: Our aggressive pricing strategy helped us capture 15% market share in one year.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Agresif fiyatlandirma stratejimiz bir yilda %15 pazar payi ele gecirmemize yardimci oldu.
vocabulary.extra: If we capture more market share, investors will gain confidence in our growth.
vocabulary.extraTr: Daha fazla pazar payi ele gecirirsek, yatirimcilar buyumemize guven duyacak.

vocabulary.example: Social media campaigns are key to building brand awareness among younger consumers.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sosyal medya kampanyalari genc tuketiciler arasinda marka bilinirligini olusturmanin anahtaridir.
vocabulary.extra: We built brand awareness through strategic partnerships and influencer marketing.
vocabulary.extraTr: Stratejik ortakliklar ve influencer pazarlamasi yoluyla marka bilinirligini olusturduk.

vocabulary.example: The new strategy delivered results beyond our expectations.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yeni strateji beklentilerimizin otesinde sonuc verdi.
vocabulary.extra: A team that consistently delivers results earns the trust of stakeholders.
vocabulary.extraTr: Surekli sonuc sunan bir ekip, paydaslarin guvenini kazanir.

vocabulary.example: The product launch met expectations in terms of both sales and customer feedback.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Urun lansmanI hem satis hem de musteri geri bildirimi acisindan beklentileri karsiladi.
vocabulary.extra: If we don't meet expectations this quarter, we'll need to revise our approach.
vocabulary.extraTr: Bu ceyrekte beklentileri karsilamazsak, yaklasimimizi revize etmemiz gerekecek.

vocabulary.example: The sales team exceeded targets by 18%, earning a performance bonus.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Satis ekibi hedefleri %18 asarak performans bonusu kazandi.
vocabulary.extra: When you exceed targets consistently, it sets a precedent for excellence.
vocabulary.extraTr: Hedefleri surekli astiginizda, mukemmellik icin bir emsal olusturur.

vocabulary.example: This deal sets a precedent for how we handle international negotiations.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu anlasma uluslararasi muzakereleri nasil yonettigimize dair emsal olusturuyor.
vocabulary.extra: By offering flexible terms, we set a precedent that competitors now follow.
vocabulary.extraTr: Esnek sartlar sunarak, rakiplerin simdi takip ettigi bir emsal olusturduk.

vocabulary.example: Publishing case studies helped us establish credibility with enterprise clients.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Vaka calismalari yayinlamak, kurumsal musteriler nezdinde guvenilirlik olusturmamiza yardimci oldu.
vocabulary.extra: You can't close a deal unless you've established credibility first.
vocabulary.extraTr: Once guvenilirlik olusturmadan bir anlasma kapatamazsiniz.

vocabulary.example: Our open-door policy fosters innovation by encouraging ideas from all levels.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Acik kapi politikamiz tum seviyelerden fikirleri tesvik ederek inovasyonu destekliyor.
vocabulary.extra: Companies that foster innovation are better positioned to navigate challenges.
vocabulary.extraTr: Inovasyonu tesvik eden sirketler, zorluklari asmak icin daha iyi konumlanir.

vocabulary.example: In today's fast-paced business world, you must embrace change to stay competitive.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Gunumuzun hizli is dunyasinda, rekabetci kalmak icin degisimi benimsemelisiniz.
vocabulary.extra: The companies that embraced change early gained a significant advantage.
vocabulary.extraTr: Degisimi erken benimseyen sirketler onemli bir avantaj elde etti.

vocabulary.example: We implemented new safety protocols to mitigate risks in the supply chain.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tedarik zincirindeki riskleri azaltmak icin yeni guvenlik protokolleri uyguladik.
vocabulary.extra: Had we mitigated risks earlier, the financial impact would have been minimal.
vocabulary.extraTr: Riskleri daha once azaltsaydik, finansal etki minimal olurdu.

vocabulary.example: We leverage technology to automate repetitive tasks and free up human resources.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tekrarli gorevleri otomatiklestirmek ve insan kaynaklarini serbest birakmak icin teknolojiyi kullaniyoruz.
vocabulary.extra: Companies that leverage technology effectively tend to scale operations faster.
vocabulary.extraTr: Teknolojiyi etkili kullanan sirketler operasyonlari daha hizli olceklendirme egilimindedir.

vocabulary.example: Strong leadership is essential to navigate challenges during economic uncertainty.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ekonomik belirsizlik donemlerinde zorluklari asmak icin guclu liderlik gereklidir.
vocabulary.extra: The CEO navigated challenges by fostering innovation and embracing change.
vocabulary.extraTr: CEO, inovasyonu tesvik ederek ve degisimi benimseyerek zorluklari asti.

vocabulary.example: To sustain growth, we need to continuously invest in R&D.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Buyumeyi surdurmek icin surekli Ar-Ge'ye yatirim yapmamiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Sustaining growth requires both financial discipline and strategic vision.
vocabulary.extraTr: Buyumeyi surdurmek hem finansal disiplin hem de stratejik vizyon gerektirir.

vocabulary.example: Our digital marketing campaign generated over 500 qualified leads last month.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Dijital pazarlama kampanyamiz gecen ay 500'den fazla nitelikli potansiyel musteri olustUrdu.
vocabulary.extra: If we generated more leads, the sales pipeline would be much stronger.
vocabulary.extraTr: Daha fazla potansiyel musteri olustursak, satis hatti cok daha guclu olurdu.

vocabulary.example: After three months of negotiations, we finally closed the deal worth $2 million.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Uc aylik muzakerelerden sonra, 2 milyon dolar degerindeki anlasmayi nihayet kapattik.
vocabulary.extra: You can't close a deal without first establishing credibility and building trust.
vocabulary.extraTr: Once guvenilirlik olusturmadan ve guven insa etmeden bir anlasma kapatamazsiniz.

vocabulary.example: After securing funding, we scaled operations from 3 countries to 12.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Finansman sagladiktan sonra operasyonlari 3 ulkeden 12'ye olceklendirdik.
vocabulary.extra: Scaling operations too quickly without maintaining quality can be dangerous.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kaliteyi korumadan operasyonlari cok hizli olceklendirmek tehlikeli olabilir.

vocabulary.example: We use a combination of KPIs and OKRs to measure performance across teams.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ekipler genelinde performansi olcmek icin KPI ve OKR kombinasyonu kullaniyoruz.
vocabulary.extra: If you can't measure performance, you can't improve it.
vocabulary.extraTr: Performansi olcemezseniz, onu iyilestiremezsiniz.

grammar.title: Advanced Collocations — Patterns and Common Errors
grammar.titleTr: Ileri Kolokasyonlar — Kaliplar ve Yaygin Hatalar
grammar.explanation: Collocations are word combinations that native speakers naturally use together. Unlike grammar rules, collocations can't always be predicted — you need to learn them. At B2 level, using correct collocations is what separates a good speaker from a great one. There are four main patterns: verb+noun, noun+verb, adjective+noun, and adverb+adjective.
grammar.explanationTr: Kolokasyonlar, anadili konusucularin dogal olarak birlikte kullandigi kelime kombinasyonlaridir. Dilbilgisi kurallarinin aksine, kolokasyonlar her zaman tahmin edilemez — onlari ogrenmek gerekir. B2 seviyesinde, dogru kolokasyon kullanimi iyi bir konusmacuyu harika bir konusmacidan ayiran seydir. Dort ana kalip vardir: fiil+isim, isim+fiil, sifat+isim ve zarf+sifat.
table: Verb + Noun: drive growth, secure funding, close a deal
We need to drive growth in emerging markets.
She secured funding for the new project.
The verb and noun are partners — changing one sounds unnatural.
Noun + Verb: profits soar, costs escalate, demand increases
Profits soared after we entered the Asian market.
Costs escalated due to supply chain disruptions.
The noun is the subject, and specific verbs collocate with it naturally.
Adjective + Noun: steep decline, fierce competition, viable option
We're facing fierce competition in the European market.
Remote work is a viable option for reducing overheads.
Some adjectives pair with specific nouns — 'fierce' competition, not 'strong' competition.
Adverb + Adjective: highly profitable, fully committed, deeply concerned
The new venture proved highly profitable within six months.
We are fully committed to maintaining quality standards.
Adverbs intensify adjectives — 'highly' profitable, not 'very' profitable in formal English.
Common Error: make a profit vs. do a profit
CORRECT: We made a significant profit this quarter.
WRONG: We did a profit this quarter.
'Make' collocates with profit, decision, progress. 'Do' collocates with business, research, damage.
Common Error: take a decision vs. make a decision
CORRECT (AmE): We need to make a decision by Friday.
CORRECT (BrE): We need to take a decision by Friday.
American English prefers 'make a decision.' Both are correct, but be consistent.
Collocation Strength: weak → medium → strong → fixed
Weak: 'make an effort' (other verbs possible)
Fixed: 'set a precedent' (no alternatives)
Stronger collocations sound more natural and professional when used correctly.

tips.en: Don't translate collocations word-for-word from Turkish. 'Kar elde etmek' becomes 'make a profit' — NOT 'obtain a profit.'
tips.tr: Kolokasyonlari Turkce'den kelime kelime cevirmeyin. 'Kar elde etmek' Ingilizce'de 'make a profit' olur — 'obtain a profit' DEGIL.

tips.en: 'Drive growth' is stronger than 'make growth' or 'create growth.' Native speakers use 'drive' with growth, change, and innovation.
tips.tr: 'Drive growth', 'make growth' veya 'create growth'tan daha gucludur. Anadili konusucular 'drive' kelimesini growth, change ve innovation ile kullanir.

tips.en: Learn collocations in context, not in isolation. 'Secure funding' makes sense in an investor pitch — memorize the whole scenario.
tips.tr: Kolokasyonlari baglam icinde ogrenin, izole degil. 'Secure funding' bir yatirimci sunumunda anlam kazanir — tum senaryoyu ezberleyin.

tips.en: 'Maximize profit' and 'minimize risk' are mirror collocations — they often appear together in business discussions.
tips.tr: 'Maximize profit' ve 'minimize risk' ayna kolokasyonlardir — is tartismalarinda siklIkla birlikte kullanilirlar.

tips.en: Use 'leverage' instead of 'use' in professional contexts: 'leverage technology' sounds more B2 than 'use technology.'
tips.tr: Profesyonel baglamlarda 'use' yerine 'leverage' kullanin: 'leverage technology' B2'de 'use technology'den daha profesyonel duyulur.

tips.en: When presenting to investors, chain collocations: 'We plan to drive growth, capture market share, and scale operations.' This shows fluency.
tips.tr: Yatirimcilara sunum yaparken kolokasyonlari zincirleyin: 'Buyume saglamayi, pazar payi ele gecirmeyi ve operasyonlari olceklendirmeyi planliyoruz.' Bu akicilik gosterir.

reading.text:
INVESTOR PITCH: SCALING FOR THE FUTURE

Good morning, ladies and gentlemen. Thank you for joining us today. My name is Eyup, and I'm the Head of Business Development at NovaTech Solutions. I'm here to present our growth strategy for the next three years and explain why we believe this is the right time to invest.

Over the past 18 months, NovaTech has gained significant momentum. We entered the European market in Q2 last year, and within just 12 months, we captured 8% market share in the logistics technology sector. Our revenue grew by 45%, and we exceeded our annual targets by a substantial margin. These results demonstrate that our business model works.

However, to sustain this growth and scale operations internationally, we need to secure additional funding. We are seeking $15 million in Series B funding to expand operations into three new markets: Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America. This investment will allow us to attract top talent, build brand awareness in these regions, and leverage our proprietary technology platform.

Our competitive advantage is clear. We have established credibility through partnerships with major logistics companies. Our platform, which handles over 200,000 transactions daily, is designed to scale. Furthermore, we foster innovation through our dedicated R&D team, which allocates 20% of revenue to developing new features.

Let me address risk. We understand that investors want to minimize risk while maximizing returns. Our diversified portfolio mitigates risks associated with regional market fluctuations. We measure performance monthly using industry benchmarks, and our management team has a proven track record of delivering results and meeting expectations.

In conclusion, NovaTech is positioned to drive growth in the global logistics technology market. We have the team, the technology, and the strategy. All we need is the right partner to help us close this chapter and open the next one. Thank you.
reading.textTr:
YATIRIMCI SUNUMU: GELECEK ICIN OLCEKLENDIRME

Gunaydin hanimefendiler ve beyefendiler. Bugun bize katildiginiz icin tesekkur ederim. Benim adim Eyup ve NovaTech Solutions'ta Is Gelistirme Muduruyum. Onumuzdeki uc yillik buyume stratejimizi sunmak ve neden yatirim yapmak icin dogru zamanin bu olduguna inandigimizi aciklamak icin buradayim.

Son 18 ayda NovaTech onemli bir ivme kazandi. Gecen yil 2. ceyrekte Avrupa pazarina girdik ve sadece 12 ay icinde lojistik teknoloji sektorunde %8 pazar payi ele gecirdik. Gelirimiz %45 buyudu ve yillik hedeflerimizi onemli bir farkla astik. Bu sonuclar is modelimizin isleydigini gosteriyor.

Ancak bu buyumeyi surdurmek ve operasyonlari uluslararasi olarak olceklendirmek icin ek finansman saglamamiz gerekiyor. Operasyonlari uc yeni pazara genisletmek icin 15 milyon dolar Seri B finansman ariyoruz: Guneydogu Asya, Orta Dogu ve Latin Amerika. Bu yatirim en iyi yetenekleri cekmemize, bu bolgelerde marka bilinirligini olusturmamiza ve tescilli teknoloji platformumuzu kullanmamiza olanak saglayacak.

Rekabet avantajimiz acik. Buyuk lojistik sirketleriyle ortakliklar araciligiyla guvenilirlik olusturduk. Gunluk 200.000'den fazla islemi yoneten platformumuz olceklendirilmek uzere tasarlanmistir. Ayrica, gelirin %20'sini yeni ozellikler gelistirmeye ayiran ozel Ar-Ge ekibimiz araciligiyla inovasyonu tesvik ediyoruz.

Risk konusunu ele alayim. Yatirimcilarin getirileri maksimize ederken riski en aza indirmek istedigini anliyoruz. Cesitlendirilmis portfoyumuz bolgesel piyasa dalgalanmalariyla iliskili riskleri azaltir. Sektorel karsilastirma olcutlerini kullanarak performansi aylik olcuyoruz ve yonetim ekibimiz sonuc sunma ve beklentileri karsilama konusunda kanitlanmis bir gecmise sahiptir.

Sonuc olarak, NovaTech kuresel lojistik teknoloji pazarinda buyume saglamak icin konumlanmistir. Ekibimiz, teknolojimiz ve stratejimiz var. Tek ihtiyacimiz olan, bu bolumu kapatip bir sonrakini acmamiza yardimci olacak dogru ortak. Tesekkurler.

questions.question: How much market share did NovaTech capture in the European logistics technology sector?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech Avrupa lojistik teknoloji sektorunde ne kadar pazar payi ele gecirdi?

questions.question: How much Series B funding is NovaTech seeking?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech ne kadar Seri B finansman ariyor?

questions.question: What percentage of revenue does NovaTech allocate to R&D?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech gelirin yuzde kacini Ar-Ge'ye ayiriyor?

questions.question: Which collocation is used to describe NovaTech's approach to uncertainty?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech'in belirsizlige yaklasimini tanimlamak icin hangi kolokasyon kullaniliyor?

questions.question: Into which three new markets does NovaTech plan to expand?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech hangi uc yeni pazara genislemeyi planliyor?
options: Southeast Asia, Middle East, Latin America

fillBlanks.sentence: Our new product line will ___ growth in emerging markets.
We need to ___ funding before we can expand operations.
The project has gained ___ since the new team joined.
By renegotiating contracts, we ___ overheads by 20%.
Our digital campaign ___ over 500 qualified leads last month.
After three months of negotiations, we finally ___ the deal.
We ___ technology to automate repetitive processes.
This deal sets a ___ for how we handle international partnerships.
Publishing case studies helped us ___ credibility.
Our open-door policy ___ innovation across all departments.
We ___ operations from 3 countries to 12 after the funding round.
It costs five times more to acquire a customer than to ___ one.
Strong leadership is essential to ___ challenges during uncertainty.
The sales team ___ targets by 18% this quarter.
We use KPIs and OKRs to ___ performance across teams.

multipleChoice.question: "We need to ___ growth in the Asian market." Dogru collocation?
"The company ___ a significant profit this quarter." Dogru olan?
"We need to ___ a decision by Friday." (American English)
"Profits ___ after we entered the new market." En dogal olan?
"The venture proved ___ profitable within six months." Dogru adverb?
"We are ___ committed to maintaining quality." Formal collocation?
"We're facing ___ competition in this market." En guclu collocation?
"Had we ___ risks earlier, the damage would have been minimal." Dogru form?
"We need to ___ resources more efficiently." Dogru fiil?
"Remote work is a ___ option for reducing costs." En uygun sifat?
"The company ___ brand awareness through social media." Dogru collocation?
"We plan to ___ operations into Latin America." Dogru fiil?
"This deal ___ a precedent for future negotiations." Dogru fiil?

sentenceOrder.correct: We need to drive growth in emerging markets
The company secured funding from two venture capital firms
Our aggressive strategy helped us capture market share
Strong leadership is essential to navigate challenges
We leverage technology to automate repetitive tasks
The sales team exceeded targets by 18% this quarter
Publishing case studies helped establish credibility with clients
This deal sets a precedent for future negotiations
We need to allocate resources more efficiently
It costs more to acquire a customer than to retain one

translation.turkish: Yeni urun hattimiz Asya pazarinda buyume saglayacak.

acceptAlso: Our new product line will drive growth in Asia

translation.turkish: Genisleme icin iki girisim sermayesi firmasindan finansman sagladik.
translation.english: We secured funding from two venture capital firms for the expansion.
acceptAlso: We secured funding from two VC firms for the expansion

translation.turkish: Satis ekibi hedefleri %18 asarak performans bonusu kazandi.
translation.english: The sales team exceeded targets by 18%, earning a performance bonus.
acceptAlso: The sales team exceeded targets by 18% and earned a performance bonus

translation.turkish: Bu anlasma uluslararasi muzakereler icin emsal olusturuyor.
translation.english: This deal sets a precedent for international negotiations.
acceptAlso: This deal sets a precedent for how we handle international negotiations

translation.turkish: Teknolojiyi tekrarli gorevleri otomatiklestirmek icin kullaniyoruz.
translation.english: We leverage technology to automate repetitive tasks.
acceptAlso: We use technology to automate repetitive tasks

translation.turkish: Riskleri daha once azaltsaydik, finansal etki minimal olurdu.
translation.english: Had we mitigated risks earlier, the financial impact would have been minimal.
acceptAlso: If we had mitigated risks earlier, the financial impact would have been minimal

translation.english: We scaled operations from 3 countries to 12.
acceptAlso: We scaled our operations from 3 countries to 12

translation.turkish: Yeni musteri kazanmak, mevcut musteriyi elde tutmaktan daha pahaliya mal olur.
translation.english: Acquiring a new customer costs more than retaining an existing one.
acceptAlso: It costs more to acquire a new customer than to retain an existing one

translation.turkish: Inovasyonu tesvik eden sirketler zorluklari daha iyi asiyor.
translation.english: Companies that foster innovation navigate challenges better.
acceptAlso: Companies that foster innovation are better at navigating challenges

translation.english: If you can't measure performance, you can't improve it.
acceptAlso: You can't improve performance if you can't measure it

dialog.title: Investor Presentation and Board Meeting
dialog.titleTr: Yatirimci Sunumu ve Yonetim Kurulu Toplantisi
dialog.context: Eyup, NovaTech Solutions sirketi adina yatirimcilara sunum yapiyor. Toplantida Ms. Chen (yatirimci, kadin), Mr. Henderson (yonetim kurulu baskani, erkek) ve Dr. Aydin (CFO, kadin) bulunuyor. Konu: sirketin uluslararasi genisleme plani ve Seri B finansman turu.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning, everyone. Welcome to this special board meeting. Today, Eyüp will present our expansion strategy to our potential investors. Eyüp, the floor is yours.
lines.textTr: Gunaydin millet. Bu ozel yonetim kurulu toplantisina hosgeldiniz. Bugun Eyup, potansiyel yatirimcilarimiza genisleme stratejimizi sunacak. Eyup, soz senin.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Mr. Henderson. Good morning, Ms. Chen, Dr. Aydın, and everyone. I'm excited to share how NovaTech plans to drive growth over the next three years and why this is the ideal time to invest.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler Bay Henderson. Gunaydin, Bayan Chen, Dr. Aydin ve herkes. NovaTech'in onumuzdeki uc yilda nasil buyume saglamayi planladigini ve neden yatirim yapmak icin ideal zamanin bu oldugunu paylasmayi heyecanla bekliyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you, Eyüp. Before you start, I'd like to mention that we've reviewed your preliminary documents. The numbers are impressive, but I have several questions about scalability.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler Eyup. Baslamadan once, on belgelerinizi inceledigimizi belirtmek isterim. Rakamlar etkileyici ama olceklenebilirlik hakkinda birka sonum var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Of course. Let me address that directly in my presentation. Over the past 18 months, we've gained significant momentum. We entered the European market and captured 8% market share within 12 months. Revenue grew by 45%, and we exceeded our annual targets.
lines.textTr: Tabii ki. Bunu sunumumda dogrudan ele alayim. Son 18 ayda onemli bir ivme kazandik. Avrupa pazarina girdik ve 12 ay icinde %8 pazar payi ele gecirdik. Gelir %45 buyudu ve yillik hedeflerimizi astik.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Those are strong numbers, Eyüp. As CFO, I can confirm that we maintained quality while reducing overheads by 15%. Our profit margins increased from 12% to 19%.
lines.textTr: Bunlar guclu rakamlar, Eyup. CFO olarak, genel giderleri %15 azaltirken kaliteyi korudugumuzu teyit edebilirim. Kar marjlarimiz %12'den %19'a yukseldi.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Exactly. And to sustain this growth, we're seeking $15 million in Series B funding. This will allow us to expand operations into Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America.
lines.textTr: Kesinlikle. Ve bu buyumeyi surdurmek icin 15 milyon dolar Seri B finansman ariyoruz. Bu, operasyonlari Guneydogu Asya, Orta Dogu ve Latin Amerika'ya genisletmemize olanak saglayacak.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Three markets simultaneously? That's ambitious. How do you plan to mitigate the risks associated with entering multiple markets at once?
lines.textTr: Ayni anda uc pazar mi? Bu iddiali. Ayni anda birden fazla pazara girmenin risklerini nasil azaltmayi planliyorsunuz?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Great question. First, we'll allocate resources in phases — not all at once. Southeast Asia launches in Q1, Middle East in Q3, and Latin America in Q1 of the following year. This phased approach minimizes risk while maximizing our learning from each market.
lines.textTr: Harika soru. Ilk olarak, kaynaklari asamali olarak tahsis edecegiz — hepsini birden degil. Guneydogu Asya 1. ceyrekte, Orta Dogu 3. ceyrekte ve Latin Amerika bir sonraki yilin 1. ceyreginde lansman yapacak. Bu asamali yaklasim, her pazardan ogrenimimizi maksimize ederken riski en aza indirir.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: What about talent? Expanding into three regions will require significant human resources. How do you plan to attract and retain the right people?
lines.textTr: Peki yetenek? Uc bolgeye genislemek onemli insan kaynaklari gerektirecek. Dogru insanlari nasil cekmeyi ve elde tutmayi planliyorsunuz?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: We've already established partnerships with local recruitment agencies in each region. To attract talent, we offer competitive packages plus equity options. To retain customers and employees alike, we foster innovation and embrace change — people want to work for companies that are going somewhere.
lines.textTr: Her bolgede yerel ise alim ajanslariyla ortakliklar zaten kurduk. Yetenek cekmek icin rekabetci paketler arti hisse opsiyonlari sunuyoruz. Hem musterileri hem de calisanlari elde tutmak icin inovasyonu tesvik ediyor ve degisimi benimsiyoruz — insanlar bir yere giden sirketlerde calismak istiyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I appreciate the phased approach. Now, let's talk numbers. What return can investors expect? When do you project we'll see a return on investment?
lines.textTr: Asamali yaklasimi takdir ediyorum. Simdi rakamlara gelelim. Yatirimcilar ne getiri bekleyebilir? Yatirim getirisini ne zaman gorecegimizi onguruyorsunuz?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Based on our projections, we expect to generate leads in the new markets within six months. By year two, we project a 3x return on investment. Our benchmarks from the European expansion support these numbers — we actually delivered results faster than projected there.
lines.textTr: Projeksiyonlarimiza dayanarak, yeni pazarlarda alti ay icinde potansiyel musteri olusturmayi bekliyoruz. Ikinci yila kadar 3 kat yatirim getirisi onguruyoruz. Avrupa genislemesindeki referans degerlerimiz bu rakamlari destekliyor — aslinda orada ongurulenden daha hizli sonuc sunduk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I should add that our technology platform handles over 200,000 transactions daily. It's built to scale operations without proportional cost increases. That's how we maintain quality while increasing margins.
lines.textTr: Teknoloji platformumuzun gunluk 200.000'den fazla islemi yonettigini eklemeliyim. Orantili maliyet artislari olmadan operasyonlari olceklendirmek icin insa edilmistir. Marjlari artirirken kaliteyi boyle koruyoruz.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: One more question. You mentioned building brand awareness. What's your go-to-market strategy for regions where NovaTech is completely unknown?
lines.textTr: Bir soru daha. Marka bilinirligini olusturmaktan bahsettiniz. NovaTech'in tamamen bilinmedigi bolgeler icin pazara giris stratejiniz ne?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: We plan to build brand awareness through three channels. First, strategic partnerships with established local companies — this establishes credibility immediately. Second, targeted digital marketing to generate leads. And third, industry conferences where we can demonstrate our platform live. This approach helped us capture market share in Europe, and it sets a precedent for our future expansion.
lines.textTr: Marka bilinirligini uc kanal araciligiyla olusturmayi planliyoruz. Birincisi, kurulu yerel sirketlerle stratejik ortakliklar — bu hemen guvenilirlik olusturur. Ikincisi, potansiyel musteri olusturmak icin hedefli dijital pazarlama. Ve ucuncusu, platformumuzu canli gosterebildigimiz sektir konferanslari. Bu yaklasim Avrupa'da pazar payi ele gecirmemize yardimci oldu ve gelecekteki genislememiz icin emsal olusturuyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you, Eyüp. That was a very thorough and convincing presentation. Ms. Chen, do you have any final thoughts before we move to the decision phase?
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler Eyup. Bu cok kapsamli ve ikna edici bir sunumdu. Bayan Chen, karar asamasina gecmeden once son dusunceleriniz var mi?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I'm impressed. The numbers speak for themselves, and the phased approach to mitigating risks is exactly what I like to see. I believe NovaTech has the potential to close this deal and deliver exceptional results. Let's move forward.
lines.textTr: Etkilendim. Rakamlar kendileri icin konusuyor ve riskleri azaltmaya yonelik asamali yaklasim tam da gormek istedigim sey. NovaTech'in bu anlasmayi kapatma ve olaganustu sonuclar sunma potansiyeline sahip olduguna inaniyorum. Ilerlemeye devam edelim.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Ms. Chen. Thank you, Mr. Henderson and Dr. Aydın. We're fully committed to leveraging this investment to scale operations, navigate any challenges ahead, and exceed every target we set. Let's close this deal and build something extraordinary together.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, Bayan Chen. Tesekkurler, Bay Henderson ve Dr. Aydin. Bu yatirimi operasyonlari olceklendirmek, ondeki tum zorluklari asmak ve belirledigimiz her hedefi asmak icin kullanmaya tamamen kararliyiz. Bu anlasmayi kapatalim ve birlikte olaganustu bir sey insa edelim.

questions.question: How much Series B funding is Eyüp seeking from investors?
questions.questionTr: Eyup yatirimcilardan ne kadar Seri B finansman ariyor?

questions.question: What phased approach does Eyüp propose for market entry?
questions.questionTr: Eyup pazara giris icin hangi asamali yaklasimi oneiriyor?
options: Southeast Asia Q1, Middle East Q3, Latin America next year Q1
Middle East first, then Asia, then Latin America
Latin America first, then the other two

questions.question: What return on investment does Eyüp project by year two?
questions.questionTr: Eyup ikinci yila kadar ne kadar yatirim getirisi ongoruyor?

questions.question: Which three channels does Eyüp plan to use for building brand awareness?
questions.questionTr: Eyup marka bilinirligini olusturmak icin hangi uc kanali kullanmayi planliyor?

questions.question: What was Ms. Chen's final reaction to the presentation?
questions.questionTr: Bayan Chen'in sunuma son tepkisi ne oldu?
options: She was skeptical about the timeline
She was impressed and wanted to move forward

resources.description: Yatirimci sunumu ve is toplantisi dili videolari
